subject: One Question Poll [Speaker Ryan]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Take our instant poll and tell us what you think of Paul Ryan after his first two months as Speaker: --------------------------------------------------------- | | |
* * *
---
[1](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [2](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [3](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [4](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [5](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all")
---|---|---|---|---
---
_(Unsure?**[Click here>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18b/2678296976/VEsA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Ryan-Poll?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all")** )_
We're barely two months into Speaker Ryan's tenure and the Republican-controlled Congress is (once again) on the brink of a shutdown.

**Paul Ryan is proof that the more things change, the more the stay the same.**

Here are a few of the terrible bills that Paul Ryan already succeeded in passing through Congress since he became Speaker of the House:

* An unprecedented **repeal of Obamacare** that would reverse the Medicaid expansion that helped hundreds of thousands of Americans.

* The **defunding of Planned Parenthood** that would cut off access to women's healthcare.

* **Banning entry for Syrian refugees** of ISIS in a move that diametrically opposes our American values of tolerance and acceptance.

And yet, when it comes to immigration reform or critical legislation to curb gun violence, Paul Ryan's Congress REFUSES to act.
**So we need to hear from you:**

**On a scale of 1 through 5, how would you rate Paul Ryan as Speaker of the House?**
| | [1](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [2](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [3](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [4](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all") | [5](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18a/2678296976/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWEo1WVc0dGNHOXNiRjBvY0dGblpTOXpMM0o1WVc0dGNHOXNiQ2tsSlE9PSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL3J5YW4tcG9sbC9ncDNjZzgifQ==/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/ocs/ryan-poll/gp3cg8?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all")
---|---|---|---|---
---
_(Unsure?**[Click here>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18b/2678296976/VEsHBw/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Ryan-Poll?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all")** )_
In just a few short weeks, Speaker Ryan has shown that he means business when it comes to attacking our Democratic priorities.

Look, we knew as soon as the "architect of the plan to destroy Medicare and Social Security" became Speaker of the House that this wouldn't be good. _But we had no idea it would be this bad._

So that's why we need to hear from you -- _today:_

**[Click here to take our instant poll and let us know what you think of Paul Ryan's first two months as Speaker >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18b/2678296976/VEsHBg/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Ryan-Poll?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all")**

[**http://go.boldpac.com/Ryan-Poll**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ae/e60883a/701faafe/1443d18b/2678296976/VEsHAQ/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Ryan-Poll?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.12_B1_ryan-poll_X__F2_S2_C1__all")

Thanks for all your help,

BOLD PAC

|

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

name: Ted Cruz
subject: they're coming for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, it's happening... Last night the gold standard of Iowa polls broke putting me in first place with a ten percent lead! |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32236157:WiJr7KyrN:m:1:1104269936:1658B09C79578E05B14C51F331E93C7B:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend, it's happening...

Last night, the gold standard of Iowa polls broke putting me in **first place** with a **ten percent lead!**

With less than 50 days until Iowans are heard -- this is the clear and decisive lead we've been working so hard to build.

_But Friend, this also means we are about to be attacked like never before._

That's why I'm reaching out to you today with a personal request.

I am already facing the most brutal attacks since I announced my campaign, and it's not just the left who is truly desperate to discredit and destroy me.

Just look at the attacks coming my way:

| **>** | Ted Cruz fought too hard to repeal Obamacare;

---|---
**>** | Ted Cruz is Pro-life;

**>** | Ted Cruz doesn't get along with the Washington Cartel or cozy up to the liberal media;

**>** | Ted Cruz is too conservative.

This is just the beginning.

Can I count on you to make an emergency donation to support my campaign and **help me fight back against the attacks that are pouring in?**

[** EMERGENCY DONATE $10 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32236158:WiJr7KyrN:m:1:1104269936:1658B09C79578E05B14C51F331E93C7B:r)

[** EMERGENCY DONATE $25 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32236159:WiJr7KyrN:m:1:1104269936:1658B09C79578E05B14C51F331E93C7B:r)

[** EMERGENCY DONATE $50 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32236160:WiJr7KyrN:m:1:1104269936:1658B09C79578E05B14C51F331E93C7B:r)

[** EMERGENCY DONATE $150 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32236161:WiJr7KyrN:m:1:1104269936:1658B09C79578E05B14C51F331E93C7B:r)

[** ANOTHER AMOUNT » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32236162:WiJr7KyrN:m:1:1104269936:1658B09C79578E05B14C51F331E93C7B:r)

Even Hillary Clinton's super PAC is getting worried. See the headline below:

_"Clinton ally Brock lays out Cruz attack plan"_ \-- Politico _12/11/15_

These headlines are only going to get worse as we rapidly approach the first-in-the-nation Iowa caucuses.

I know it's a lot to ask, but you are one of my best supporters and if I can't count on you, I don't know where else to turn.

Heidi and I are so very grateful for your continued support.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Rand Paul
subject: We are in it to win it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
We did it.
Rand is on the main stage at the CNN debate.
This is a huge moment, proving that Rand is a
top contender in this race.
All of the polls agree. CBS shows Rand ahead
of Kasich, Bush, Fiorina, and Christie and the latest Fox News
poll has Rand in 5th place in Iowa.
Senator Paul has a national, first tier
campaign that is organized in all 50 states. He is on the ballot
everywhere that has had filing. We have over 400 fully
operational grassroots groups, and his campaign and related
entities have raised $22 million for this race. It is simply
undeniable that Rand is a serious competitor in this race and his
participation in Tuesday night's debate will give him another
chance to prove exactly why.

SHOW YOUR SUPPORT
BEFORE TUESDAY NIGHT'S DEBATE

Last month's debate gave us a chance to prove
that Rand is the only conservative in this race. Since then, poll
numbers have just continued to surge.
It is clear to anyone watching that Rand's
message of liberty-minded, common sense policy is resonating with
the American public.
I know I can count on liberty-loving
Americans like you to make sure our message reaches even more
people.

We need the naysayers to know, we are here to
stay.
We won a spot on the main stage on Tuesday
night, and with your help, we will win Iowa and beyond.
I'm confident that this debate is a huge show
of strength for Rand. Will you stand with Rand by donating today?
In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Happy holidays](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQyMzA0MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxMzYwNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Show Hillary you have her back | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: FW: Need you on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

I just wanted to make sure you saw the email that my team sent on Friday. Our call to action is delivering a powerful message and making an impact. We have already seen dozens of news stories, but we can't stop now.

[_**Please join our call and add your name now.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c30/70cdc2ba/47bc6616/3964dd5/3794185154/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+join+our+call+and+add+your+name+n&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")

I pasted the email below for you if you didn't see it yet.

Thank you,
Chris

From: Team Van Hollen
Sent: Friday, December 11, 2015 1:27 PM
Subject: Need you on this | | **BREAKING: AP: Van Hollen: Ban Gun Sales to Those on FBI Terrorist List**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: Stand with Chris on this Important Issue**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c30/70cdc2ba/47bc6616/3964dd2/3794185154/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+Stand+with+Chris+on+this+I&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")
---

Friend,

In the wake of continuing gun massacres and the daily toll of gun violence across America, we have all been angered by Republicans in Congress who refuse to take even the smallest step to prevent gun violence and keep our communities safe.

In fact, just this past week, Republicans repeatedly blocked a common sense proposal that would prevent individuals on the FBI's terrorist watch list from purchasing guns. It seems there is no end to the GOP's loyalty to the NRA.

Our fight is not over. As the AP reported last night, "Maryland Rep. Chris Van Hollen is urging Gov. Larry Hogan to 'explore every possible state action' to stop gun sales to dangerous individuals, particularly those on the FBI Terrorist Watchlist."

**[Stand with Chris on this important issue.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c30/70cdc2ba/47bc6616/3964dd3/3794185154/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Stand+with+Chris+on+this+important+issue&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")**

Our state has led the country before on efforts to reduce gun violence, and we can do it again now.

[**Sign our petition to show you support Chris and his effort to keep Maryland families safe.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c30/70cdc2ba/47bc6616/3964dd0/3794185154/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ban-gun-sales-to-terrorists?source=em121015_Gun&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Sign+our+petition+to+show+you+support+Ch&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun")

Thank you for your help on this urgent matter.

Team Van Hollen

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c30/70cdc2ba/47bc6616/3964dd1/3794185154/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em121015_Gun&source=em121015_Gun") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
